rules.title: Skill references environment credentials
rules.why_it_matters: Skills that require credentials can inherit sensitive access from the local environment.
recommended_actions: Review required credentials before enabling the skill.
Use scoped credentials with minimum permissions.
recommended_alternatives: Use a read-only or unauthenticated skill variant if available.
rules.migration_instruction: Create a dedicated low-privilege token for this skill instead of reusing personal credentials.

rules.title: Skill remote install source detected
rules.why_it_matters: Remote skill sources can add new instructions, dependencies or scripts to the agent environment.
recommended_actions: Pin the source to a commit or release.
recommended_alternatives: Use bundled or community-vetted skills where available.
rules.migration_instruction: Pin the skill source to a commit SHA and review SKILL.md before enabling it.
